title: Retire obsolete historical AI and workflow ADRs
summary: Removed superseded ADR files that only preserved old AI asset, wrapper, task-model, or workflow history after their active guidance had been fully extracted.
results: Removed obsolete historical AI/workflow ADRs from the portable ADR set.
Repointed remaining active references to canonical guides and rationale documents.
Extended ADR maintenance rules so retired tooling and wrapper history does not remain in the portable ADR directory.
